list.title: Access
list.subtitle: Applications your team grants access to — who can reach what.

empty.title: No applications yet
empty.description: Add the SaaS products, systems and services your team grants access to — then track who can reach each one.

form.cloneSubtitle: A new application pre-filled from this one. Review it, then grant access separately.
form.urlDescription: Scheme-less hosts and http(s) only; other schemes are rejected.
form.criticalDescription: Access here is especially sensitive (production infra, finance) and is highlighted in listings.

detail.notFoundDescription: It may have been deleted, or the API is unreachable.
detail.noActiveGrants: No active grants. Grant access to record who can reach this application.

access.grantDescription: Give a user access to this application. A user may hold several grants at different access levels.
access.accessLevelDescription: Optional, free-form — pick a common value or type whatever this application calls its roles.
access.expiresDescription: Optional and informative — access is not auto-revoked at expiry.
access.notesPlaceholder: Optional — e.g. requested for the Q3 migration
access.editDescriptionPrefix: Update the expiry and notes for
access.editDescriptionSuffix: . The grant itself is unchanged — to change the access level, revoke and grant again.
access.editExpiresDescription: Optional and informative — access is not auto-revoked at expiry. Clear it to make the grant permanent.
access.editNotesDescription: Leave empty to clear the note.
access.revokeDescriptionSuffix: . The grant is kept in history — revoking ends it, it is not a deletion.

avatars.deactivatedTooltip: {count, plural, one {# deactivated grantee} other {# deactivated grantees}}
